subcodes.first_line: Whereas His honor Há, upon whom rest all-glorious splendors, had sought permission for his brother to attain the presence, now this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینکه جناب حا علیه من کل بهاء ابهاه درباره اخوی اذن حضور خواسته بودند حال این
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @consolation and comfort
